caption: Narendra Modi stands behind a wooden podium, delivering a speech in a room with a textured, dark green stone wall. He is wearing a light-colored, sleeveless jacket over a long-sleeved beige garment. Two microphones are mounted on the podium in front of him. To his right, a decorative vertical glass column containing small red flowers is visible. Throughout the sequence, he speaks with an expressive facial expression, gesturing with his right hand to emphasize his points. Initially, he raises his index finger high in the air while looking forward. As the scene progresses, he lowers his hand, bringing his index finger closer to his face, gesturing towards his chin and mouth as he continues speaking. The background and his attire remain constant, while only his hand gestures and facial expressions shift.
